历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for Physics Category (including Science) were approximately 9963 → 14200 → 12251 → 14683 → 13471. After a significant drop in 2022, there was a recovery in 2023, followed by another drop in 2024, and a recovery to about 13471 in 2025. Over the past five years, the overall trend shows a decline, with a fluctuation range of about 4000 positions. The enrollment plan for this university in Heilongjiang Province for Physics Category was 36 students from 2021 to 2023, increased to 41 students in 2024–2025, and is planned to be 44 students in 2026, an expansion of about 7.3% compared to 2025. Expansion means slightly intensified competition, and the ranking numbers may increase.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: 211 Project and Double First-Class construction university; the main ranking of Shanghai Ranking's Chinese universities has been stable in the 42–47 range in recent years, rising to 45th in 2026, ranking among the top in national agriculture and forestry universities; Douyin comprehensive popularity ranking 54th (relatively hot), with 14 sample videos mainly involving positive content such as graduation parades; no significant negative events for Huazhong Agricultural University in 2026 were found in reputation documents, and no enrollment interruption records in recent years, overall reputation stable; in the fifth round of discipline evaluation, Veterinary Medicine A+, Animal Science A+, Crop Science A, Aquaculture A, Food Science and Engineering A, with a total of 5 A-/A/A+ disciplines, distinctive agricultural and forestry characteristics, which have some appeal for related major applications.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Engineering majors such as Computer Science, Electronic Information/Communication, and Electrical Engineering are highly recommended in social heat, while agriculture and forestry-related majors (Biology, Chemistry, Environment, Materials) are clearly discouraged in social heat; the total number of ordinary college entrance examination candidates in Heilongjiang Province in 2026 is about 167,000, a decrease from about 172,000 total for Physics and History categories in 2025. Estimating based on the 2025 Physics Category proportion of 68.2%, the 2026 Physics Category is about 114,000, a decrease of about 3% from 117,400 in 2025. The decrease in candidates has a mitigating effect on competition. Huazhong Agricultural University is located in Wuhan, Hubei, and its enrollment proportion in Heilongjiang Province is very small (about 0.6%), so cross-provincial enrollment is limitedly affected by regional preferences.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the 2025 baseline ranking of 13471, the 2026 expansion of about 7.3% (pushing the ranking number up), the decrease in Heilongjiang Province Physics Category candidates by about 3% (pulling the ranking number down), and the slight rise in Shanghai Ranking (increasing attention), the expansion effect is slightly stronger than the candidate reduction effect. It is expected that the minimum admission ranking in 2026 will slightly decline from 2025; the predicted minimum ranking is about 14082, with a range of 13582–14582.

- Smart Agriculture.

Candidates with rankings better than the lower limit of the range (<13582) can focus on sprinting for Tier 1 popular engineering majors such as Optoelectronic Information Science and Engineering and Computer Class; candidates with rankings in the middle of the range (13582–14582) are advised to focus on Tier 2 majors such as Food Science and Engineering Class, Mechanical Class, and Horticulture, while also considering Tier 1 sprinting; candidates with rankings near the upper limit of the range (>14582) are advised to use Tier 3 majors such as Landscape Architecture, Aquaculture Class, and Public Administration Class as safety options, while also paying attention to Tier 2 majors with lower ranking requirements.

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for History Category (including Liberal Arts) were approximately 1687 → 1729 → 2011 → 2327 → 2215, showing an overall backward trend. In 2024, it significantly shifted back to 2327, then slightly recovered to 2215 in 2025, with a cumulative backward shift of about 500 places over the past 3 years. The enrollment plan for History Category in Heilongjiang Province remained at 11 students from 2021 to 2026, unchanged for 6 consecutive years, with no expansion or reduction impact.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: A 211 Project and Double First-Class construction university; ranked 45th in the 2026 Soft Science China University Main Ranking, with a stable ranking in the 42–47 range in recent years, leading among agricultural and forestry universities nationwide; ranked 54th in Douyin comprehensive popularity (relatively hot); no significant negative events or enrollment gaps recorded in reputation files, overall reputation stable; Veterinary Science A+, Animal Science A+, Crop Science A, Aquaculture A, Food Science and Engineering A, with a total of 5 A-/A/A+ disciplines, distinct agricultural and forestry characteristics; among History Category majors, Landscape Architecture corresponds to Landscape Architecture (fifth round evaluation A+), and Economics corresponds to Applied Economics (not individually rated).

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Among History Category majors, Economics shows divided social popularity and wait-and-see attitude, Business Administration is clearly discouraged, Landscape Architecture has an A+ discipline evaluation but overall popularity is average; the total number of candidates for the 2026 Heilongjiang Province general college entrance examination is about 167,000, with History Category accounting for 31.8% in 2025, estimated at about 53,100 in 2026, a decrease of about 2.9% from 54,700 in 2025, which eases competition; Huazhong Agricultural University is located in Wuhan, Hubei, with a very small enrollment proportion in Heilongjiang Province, and cross-provincial enrollment is limited by regional preferences.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the 2025 baseline ranking of 2215, the enrollment plan remaining unchanged, a decrease of about 2.9% in History Category candidates (lowering the ranking number), a recent backward trend but a slight recovery in 2025, the candidate reduction effect slightly dominates, and the minimum admission ranking for 2026 is expected to move slightly forward from 2025; predicted minimum ranking around 2200, with a range of 1870–2530.
